conversation.text: hey Sarah, noticed you run a dental practice. your reception team probably gets hammered with the same basic questions about pricing and appointments all day right?
Yes! All day long. It's exhausting for them.

haha yeah it happens in Every clinic we speak to. the agent handles all of that instantly 24/7 so your team can focus on the patient in front of them|||worth a quick chat with Louis to see how it integrates with your booking system?
I'd love that. Send me the link.
